_meta.description: Runs once per student on first install. Collects course choice, confirms identity details, asks sibling status, fills school/class/subject, then hands off to daily_activity flow.
nextjs_notes: Render one step per chat bubble in sequence, keyed by step_id.

display_text is what renders in the chat bubble. voice_text is the script for audio playback — it is written to sound natural when spoken, so play audio_location alongside display_text, never derive one from the other.
Maintain a step history array. On back_step, pop the stack and re-render that step; do not re-trigger side effects (points, caching) twice.

input_mode values: static (no input, auto-advance on tap-to-continue or timer), buttons_only (render options[] as pill buttons, disable free text), radio (render options[] as radio group), free_text (render a text input), form (render form_fields[] as one inline card).
cache_fields lists which keys to write to student cache the moment they are collected or confirmed. Cached values should pre-fill any future step that reads them.
fallback_guide fires only when input_mode is buttons_only, radio, or form and the student sends free text instead of using the control. It re-shows the same step's controls, it does not advance.
Resolve every {{placeholder}} in display_text from cache before rendering. voice_text fields are pre-written to avoid placeholders entirely — use them as-is.
variants object: pick the single variant matching cache.selected_course and render only that one.
[confetti] in display_text is a render hint, trigger your confetti component, then strip the tag before showing text.
[Xpts] or [+Xpts] in display_text is a render hint for an animated point-badge component, strip tag before showing text, and increment the points balance in state by the points_awarded value.
sub_display and form_fields blocks render as cards directly beneath the bubble, not as separate messages.
On flow completion (last step's next_step is null and it links onward), hand off to daily_activity.json starting at its first step_id.

steps.display_text: Hi champ 👋 Thanks for installing the TAP APP — you're already one step ahead. Let's get you set up!
steps.voice_text: Hi champ! Thanks so much for installing the TAP app — honestly, just showing up already puts you one step ahead. Let's get you set up!

steps.display_text: Which course do you want to enroll in? Pick one below 👇
steps.voice_text: So, which course are you thinking of joining? Take a look below and pick whichever one feels right.
steps.fallback_guide: Hey, just tap one of the four course buttons above — that's all you need to do! 😊

steps.note: Render the single variant matching cache.selected_course. {{name}} resolves from cache for display_text only.

science.display_text: Ayyyy Science?! That's amazing, {{name}} — future scientist right here 🔬 Are you sure you want to lock in Science? Just so you know, your course can't be changed once you confirm.
science.voice_text: Ooooh, Science? That's amazing — I can already picture you as a future scientist! Just double checking though, once you lock this in, it's staying locked. So, are you sure about Science?

coding.display_text: Ayyyy Coding?! Love that energy, {{name}} — future developer incoming 💻 Are you sure you want to lock in Coding? Just so you know, your course can't be changed once you confirm.
coding.voice_text: Coding, nice! I love that energy, future developer right here. Quick heads up though — once you confirm this, there's no switching later. So, are you sure you want to go with Coding?

financial-verticals.display_text: Ayyyy Financial Verticals?! Smart move, {{name}} — money mindset activated 📈 Are you sure you want to lock in Financial Verticals? Just so you know, your course can't be changed once you confirm.
financial-verticals.voice_text: Financial Verticals, smart choice! Money mindset officially activated. Just so you know, once you confirm this one it's permanent — so are you sure you want to go ahead?

visual-arts.display_text: Ayyyy Visual Arts?! So cool, {{name}} — creative genius detected 🎨 Are you sure you want to lock in Visual Arts? Just so you know, your course can't be changed once you confirm.
visual-arts.voice_text: Visual Arts, so cool — creative genius detected right away! One quick thing though, once this is confirmed it can't be changed later. So, are you sure you want to lock it in?

steps.fallback_guide: Tap '✅ Yes, I'm sure!' to confirm your course or '🔄 Let me re-pick' to go back — it's that simple!

steps.display_text: [confetti] Woohoo {{name}}! You're officially enrolled in {{course_display}} 🎉 Let's make it count.
steps.voice_text: Woohoo! You're officially enrolled — let's make it count!
steps.note: [confetti] triggers confetti animation, strip before rendering text. course_display resolves from cache.selected_course.

steps.voice_text: Alright, now let's just double check your details.

sub_display.note: Render as a read-only info card directly beneath the bubble.

steps.fallback_guide: Tap 'Looks good 👍' if everything is correct, or '✏️ Edit details' to make changes.

steps.display_text: No worries! Which detail would you like to change?
steps.voice_text: No worries at all, happens to everyone. Which detail would you like to change?
steps.fallback_guide: Pick one of the fields above to edit it.

steps.display_text: What should I call you? Just type your name below 😊
steps.voice_text: What should I call you? Go ahead and type your name below.

steps.fallback_guide: Please enter a valid phone number.

steps.voice_text: Pick your preferred language from the options below.
steps.fallback_guide: Tap your preferred language from the buttons above.

steps.voice_text: Quick question — do you have a sibling?
steps.fallback_guide: Tap Yes or No — just one tap!

steps.display_text: A few more quick ones — fill these in and we're almost done! 🚀
steps.voice_text: Just a few more quick details and then we're all done here.
steps.note: Render as one inline form card. Pre-fill any field already in cache. On submit, cache all three fields then advance.
steps.fallback_guide: Fill in your School, Class, and Favourite Subject in the form above and hit submit!

steps.display_text: Congrats {{name}} 🎉 You just earned [500pts] for completing your profile! You're crushing it already.
steps.voice_text: Congratulations! You just earned five hundred points for completing your profile. You're crushing it already!
steps.note: [500pts] is a render hint for the animated point-badge component, strip before rendering text.

steps.display_text: You can check your points anytime on the Passport tab 🛂✨ Now — are you ready to start learning?
steps.voice_text: By the way, you can check your points anytime on the Passport tab. Now then — are you ready to start learning?
